title: Saudi Arabian Hazelnut Cakes
description: A rich and crunchy dessert originating from Saudi Arabia, made with hazelnuts and a touch of sweetness.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together crote, shattering sugar, and cinnamon.
Add chopped hazelnuts and mix until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together croute flour and a pinch of salt.
Add dry ingredients to the hazelnut mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Allow cakes to cool before serving.
